comment: Per-component fidelity cases. Each renders ONE <ds-*> instance (via component-harness.html) to match ONE Figma node, so they can be pixel-diffed. `node` = the exact variant node id. `params` become element attributes (empty string = boolean flag; `fg` sets icon color; `bg`/`w`/`pad` are harness directives). `mask` = CSS selectors for non-deterministic regions (QR codes, charts). Fill this in as you build components — see FIDELITY.md.
